# Performance Analysis — Week of 2026-05-18

**Generated by:** performance-analyst-agent  
**Run timestamp:** 2026-05-18T07:00:00Z

---

## Executive Summary

The system's foundational data quality issue has sharply worsened this week: the explicit clean research pool has collapsed from 493 to 104 traders, driven by `update_research_exclusions.py` incorrectly setting `research_excluded=0` for 7,748 traders who fail the ≥20 resolved trades criterion. Simultaneously, a new cluster of 39 traders has appeared above ELO 3,500 (max ELO now 4,305 vs 3,471 last week), which matches the ARB_BOT pattern from May 6. These two data issues together put Phase 5 Gate 2 progress at risk: without a clean pool, finding confidence levels cannot be established. `feedback.json` was also corrupted by research-scout-agent this week — it has been restored from git in this session. Signal-agent remains stalled (5 days) with the Putin invasion market resolving in ~13 days.

---

## 🚨 Flags Requiring Attention

### FLAG 1 — CRITICAL: Explicit Clean Pool Collapsed 493 → 104

**What:** The authoritative research pool has dropped from 493 traders (May 13) to 104 traders (May 18). The `research_excluded = 0` flag now covers 7,852 traders — a jump from 604 on May 13. Of those 7,852, only 104 have `resolved_trades_count >= 20`. The other 7,748 fail the minimum sample-size criterion.

**Diagnostic query result:**
```
research_excluded=0: 7,852
have_20_resolved:       104  ← bottleneck
not_bot_suspect:      7,852  (all pass)
not_wash_suspect:     7,852  (all pass)
explicit_clean_pool:    104
```

**Root cause:** `update_research_exclusions.py` is setting `research_excluded=0` for traders who lack the required 20+ resolved trades. This was a 111-trader discrepancy on May 13. It is now a 7,748-trader discrepancy — a 70× worsening in 5 days. The script's set-eligible logic does not match the research agent explicit criteria.

**Why this matters:** Any agent using `WHERE research_excluded = 0` without adding `AND resolved_trades_count >= 20 AND bot_suspect = 0 AND wash_trade_suspect = 0` will operate against a 7,748-trader-inflated pool. The 104-trader explicit pool is now below the Phase 5 Gate 2 requirement for meaningful HIGH confidence findings (minimum n=20 resolved markets). feedback-loop-agent, quant-research-agent, and any signal accuracy calculations are all at risk if they run without the explicit filter.

**Recommended action:** Oscar to investigate `update_research_exclusions.py` — check what changed in the last 5 days that caused the script to clear research_excluded for ~7,000 additional traders. The script should only clear research_excluded for traders who meet ALL of: `resolved_trades_count >= 20 AND bot_suspect = 0 AND wash_trade_suspect = 0 AND bot_type IS NULL`. Until fixed, mandate explicit criteria in all research queries and brief any agent spawned this week accordingly.

**Timeline:** Before spawning quant-research-agent, feedback-loop-agent, or signal-agent this week.

---

### FLAG 2 — CRITICAL: New High-ELO Cluster — 39 Traders Above ELO 3,500

**What:** Max ELO has jumped from 3,471.3 (May 13) to 4,305.1 (May 18). Query confirms 39 traders with `comprehensive_elo > 3500 AND research_excluded = 0`. Previous max before the May 6 ARB_BOT exclusion was 3,315 (ARB_BOT cluster). The new cluster is concentrated above 3,500 — same structural signature.

**Why this matters:** The May 6 ARB_BOT exclusion removed 111 traders with ELO 3,308–3,315 who were coordinated arbitrage wallets. The same pattern has potentially re-appeared at a higher ELO range. If these 39 traders are arb bots and are among the 104 explicit clean pool traders, they could contaminate signal generation.

**Recommended action:** Run RQ0.2 (bot detection) on first-repo to screen the new ELO cluster. Specifically: check if any traders with ELO > 3,500 share behavioural patterns — clustered entry timing, same-direction positions, unusual position counts. This is the same protocol that caught the May 6 ARB_BOT cluster. Next RQ0 gate was due 2026-06-13; bring it forward given this anomaly.

**Timeline:** This week — before any signal generation from traders in the >3,500 ELO range.

### FLAG 3 — CRITICAL: feedback.json Corrupted — RESTORED THIS SESSION

**What:** `brain/feedback.json` was overwritten by research-scout-agent with scout cycle summary data: `{"scout_cycles_completed": 15, "last_cycle_date": "2026-05-17", ...}`. All `approved`, `rejected`, `data_integrity_gates` keys were destroyed. This corrupted the CI pipeline (`test_feedback_file_structure` failing) and prevented feedback-loop-agent from reading strategy memory.

**Action taken:** Restored from git `d529c0a` in this session. Structure confirmed: `keys=['rejected', 'data_integrity_gates', 'approved', 'scout_cycles'], approved=4, rejected=1`.

**Root cause:** The Qwen3-Coder 30B-A3B research-scout-agent template is writing its cycle summary to `brain/feedback.json` (top-level overwrite) instead of appending to `brain/feedback.json`'s `scout_cycles` key or writing to `brain/research-scout/`. This is a template path routing bug.

**Recommended action:** Fix the research-scout-agent task template to write cycle summaries to its own output directory (`brain/agent-outputs/research-scout/` or `brain/research-scout/`) and only update the `scout_cycles` key within feedback.json (never overwrite the whole file). This is two consecutive Sundays (May 12: empty, May 17: corrupted) — if unresolved by May 24, the integration test will escalate.

**Timeline:** Fix the template before next research-scout run (daily).

Brief the agent explicitly on the 104 explicit clean pool and 7,852 research_excluded=0 discrepancy — it must use the explicit criteria filter for any new signal generation.

### FLAG 5 — HIGH: RQ1.1 Pre-Registration Due May 20 — 2 Days Remaining

**What:** The May 13 performance analyst report recommended quant-research-agent pre-register the RQ1.1 rerun methodology by May 20, 2026. Today is May 18. No pre-registration has been filed in `brain/strategy-notes/`.

**Why this matters:** RQ1.1 is a stopping-rule question. If it fails on June 1, all Phase 3 research pauses. Pre-registration must precede the run by definition to prevent post-hoc methodology selection. Missing the May 20 pre-registration deadline means either (a) the June 1 run is pushed to a later date, delaying Phase 5, or (b) the run happens without pre-registration, violating the system's core research integrity protocol.

**Recommended action:** Spawn quant-research-agent today with a single task: pre-register RQ1.1 rerun methodology. The methodology is already largely specified (from May 13 Recommendation 3): use `elo_period1_cutoff`, period T+1 = 90 days post-cutoff, minimum 30 traders with ≥5 resolved markets per period, Pearson r with p < 0.05.

**Timeline:** May 20 (2 days).

## 📈 Section 1 — Prediction Accuracy (Brier Score)

### 7-Day Window — Insufficient Data for Brier

No feedback-loop-agent run this week (last run May 13, today is the Monday cron slot). No new resolved markets with qualifying elite positions have been processed since May 13. The most recent Brier calculation remains:

- **7d Brier (May 13):** 0.3128 (dominated by STR-004 founding case — 2 markets only)
- **Naive baseline:** 0.2500

**Active trading volume context:** The May 13 report flagged only 22 active traders in 7 days (vs 279 the week before). Today's live query shows **963 active traders with 42,509 trades** in the last 7 days. This confirms the May 13 dip was a monitoring system gap or DB timestamp issue — the Polymarket monitoring system is ingesting trades normally.

**What this means for Brier:** With 963 active traders vs 22 last week, there may be many more qualifying resolved positions for the next Brier calculation. However, without feedback-loop-agent running and with the explicit clean pool at only 104 traders, the Brier calculation needs the pool issue resolved first.

**Target comparison:** System target < 0.20. The most recent meaningful Brier (May 13) was 0.3128, but this was dominated by 2 markets and the known STR-004 artefact. The authoritative clean-pool QUALIFIED accuracy of 63.16% (n=57, May 7) remains the primary signal of edge. These two metrics measure different things: Brier measures probabilistic calibration of position probabilities, QUALIFIED accuracy measures directional correctness. Given LP contamination in raw positions, QUALIFIED accuracy is more informative at this system scale.

**By category (carrying forward from May 13, unchanged — no new data):**

| Category | Brier | vs Baseline | Interpretation |
|----------|-------|-------------|----------------|
| Crypto | 0.2838 | -0.0338 (better) | Limited by 1 market |
| Geopolitics | 0.3160 | +0.0660 (worse) | STR-004 artefact |

**The distinction matters:** The 235 legendary traders are all `research_excluded=0` but most will not have 20+ resolved trades. Only 104 traders in the entire DB pass the explicit clean pool criteria. Signal strategies (STR-003, STR-004) that read from the research_excluded=0 filter will silently include thousands of unqualified traders.

**Database growth:** 96,051 → 110,548 total traders (+15.1% in 5 days). This growth rate is higher than normal (~4-5% per week previously). It may indicate a data import backfill, new markets opening, or the monitoring system catching up from a gap.

A new cluster above 3,500 is structurally suspicious. Needs RQ0.2 screening before these traders influence any signal generation.

**ELO maintenance cadence:** Daily maintenance running (ELO last updated per daily_maintenance.py). Sunday full recalculation (Step 5) is the source of significant ELO moves — the May 18 increase likely reflects this week's full recalculation on Sunday May 17.

**Legendary activity pattern (unchanged):** High-ELO traders are set-and-forget position holders. The 963 active traders (7d) are primarily in the standard and below-average tiers; legendary-tier holders enter positions over weeks and hold.

| Phase 5 Gate 2 (HIGH findings) | 1/3 | 1/3 | 1/3 | → | Stalled |

### The Clean Pool Collapse Is the System's Top Priority

The 493→104 drop is a 79% collapse in the authoritative research pool in 5 days. This is the single most important metric in the system to fix before any research proceeds. Here is why it matters in sequenced terms:

1. **Gate 2 is built on pool integrity.** The one valid HIGH confidence finding (`2026-05-07-ELO-QUALIFIED-002`, 63.16% accuracy, n=57) was computed against 57 clean-pool traders. With only 104 explicit pool traders now, future runs can still produce HIGH confidence findings — but only if the pool is used correctly.

2. **The `research_excluded=0` shortcut now returns 75× the correct pool size.** Any agent that doesn't add the explicit criteria is running against junk data.

3. **The new ELO >3,500 cluster may be within the 104 explicit pool.** If so, Phase 5 findings computed from the current pool could include arb bot contamination that artificially inflates accuracy statistics.

### QUALIFIED Accuracy Trend

Three confirmed data points on the clean pool: 63.16% (May 7), 92% (May 11, 7d window only). Both are above the 60% Phase 5 gate. No new run this week, so trend is stable. However, with the pool now at 104, the next run will produce a less stable estimate (smaller n → noisier result).

**Signal from the trend:** The ELO edge is real — both clean-pool (63.16%) and 7d window (92%) are above 60%. The challenge is accumulating enough resolved markets at the clean pool level to push Phase 5 Gate 2 from 1/3 to 3/3 HIGH confidence findings.

### Trajectory to Phase 5

**Gate 1 (feedback-loop runs ≥4):** 6/4 ✅ COMPLETE. No action needed.

**Gate 2 (HIGH confidence findings ≥3):** 1/3. Two more needed. At current cadence (1 finding per 5-6 weeks), this reaches Gate 2 by Q3 2026 at earliest. The fastest path: resolve the pool integrity issue, run feedback-loop-agent, accumulate STR-003 to n=20. Even with only 104 explicit pool traders, if enough markets resolve, Gate 2 is achievable.

**Gate 3 (pre-resolution ≥60%, ≥10 markets):** 50%/4. No new pre-resolution scans since May 10. Eight days of missed daily scans means any resolution-window signals were missed. The 8am UTC STR-002 scan appears to have stopped — needs investigation.

**Gate 4 (RQ1.1 + RQ3.2):** Both inconclusive. June 1 RQ1.1 rerun is still the target. Pre-registration must happen by May 20.

## 📋 Recommendations

### Recommendation 1 — URGENT TODAY: Investigate and Fix research_excluded Pool Collapse

**Action:** Oscar to inspect `first-repo/scripts/update_research_exclusions.py` — specifically the "set eligible" logic that sets `research_excluded=0`. Compare it against the contract explicit criteria (`resolved_trades_count >= 20 AND bot_suspect = 0 AND wash_trade_suspect = 0`). The script should never set research_excluded=0 for traders without ≥20 resolved trades.

**Specific query to diagnose:** 
```sql
SELECT COUNT(*), 
  SUM(CASE WHEN resolved_trades_count >= 20 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as meet_min,
  SUM(CASE WHEN resolved_trades_count < 20 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as below_min
FROM traders WHERE research_excluded = 0;
-- Returns: 7852 total, 104 meet_min, 7748 below_min
-- The 7748 should have research_excluded=1
```

**Why:** Lopez de Prado (*AFML*, Chapter 2) on data quality: "A single contaminated observation can invalidate an entire backtest by inflating the sample information ratio." With 7,748 false-pool traders, every accuracy calculation is potentially corrupted. Reference: `brain/decisions/2026-05-05-elo-calibration-drift-investigation.md` for prior pool integrity work.

**Timeline:** Today. Do not spawn quant-research-agent, feedback-loop-agent, or signal-agent until this is understood.

---

### Recommendation 2 — URGENT TODAY: Spawn Signal-Agent (Putin Resolves in ~13 Days)

**Action:** After confirming the pool issue is understood (or briefing the agent on the explicit filter), spawn signal-agent:
```bash
./scripts/spawn_agent.sh signal-$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M) signal-agent 3 "Routine signal scan — cadence recovery, Putin resolves June 2026"
```

**Critical brief for the agent:** Use the explicit clean pool filter (`research_excluded=0 AND resolved_trades_count>=20 AND bot_suspect=0 AND wash_trade_suspect=0`) for any new signal generation. Do NOT use `research_excluded=0` alone — it currently returns 7,852 traders of which only 104 are clean.

**Why:** The Putin market (ELO 3,323, $7,191 NO, resolves ~June 30) provides a near-term outcome data point for STR-003. STR-003 needs 19 more resolved signals to reach the n=20 validation threshold. Every missed rescan is a missed upgrade window.

**Timeline:** Today.

### Recommendation 3 — THIS WEEK: Pre-Register RQ1.1 and Screen New ELO Cluster

**Action (a) — RQ1.1 pre-registration:** Spawn quant-research-agent with a focused task: write the RQ1.1 pre-registration document to `brain/strategy-notes/` by May 20. Methodology: use `elo_period1_cutoff` as point-in-time ELO, Period T+1 = 90 days post-cutoff, minimum 30 traders with ≥5 resolved markets per period, Pearson correlation with p < 0.05. Do not run the test — only pre-register.

**Action (b) — ELO cluster screening:** As part of the RQ1.1 pre-registration, include a check: count traders with `comprehensive_elo > 3500 AND research_excluded = 0` and check for ARB_BOT behavioural signatures (same-market clustering, identical entry timing, ELO range 4100–4305). Document findings in `brain/decisions/` before the June 1 rerun.

**Why:** If the new high-ELO cluster is another ARB_BOT batch, excluding them may change the clean pool composition significantly. Running RQ1.1 with contaminated data risks an inconclusive result for the wrong reasons. Lopez de Prado (*AFML*, Chapter 14): "test only after data integrity is confirmed."

**Timeline:** May 20 (2 days).
